memoryArtifacts.headline:
Lydia Bangs Higgins
(about 1642 – 13 February 1705)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Lydia Bangs was born to Edward & Rebecca Bangs in Plymouth, Massachusetts, say 1642. 

She married in Benjamin Higgins - 24 December 1661, Eastham, Massachusetts.

zh.Plymouth Colony, British Colonial Americ: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lydia Bangs於大約1642年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼時，她的父親Edward Bangs53歲，母親Rebecka28歲。她於1661年12月24日與Benjamin Higgins Sr.在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼易亞斯坦結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1706年2月13日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦享年65歲。

zh-hans.Plymouth Colony, British Colonial Americ: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lydia Bangs于大约1642年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼时，她的父亲Edward Bangs53岁，母亲Rebecka28岁。她于1661年12月24日与Benjamin Higgins Sr.在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼易亞斯坦结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1706年2月13日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bangs
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Edward Bangs of Chichester, England, came to Plymouth Colony on board the ‘Anne’ in 1623; he is believed to have been born c. 1592.

variants.name: Banks
meanings: English: variant of Bank 5, with excrescent -s. The final -s may occasionally represent a plural form, but it is most commonly an arbitrary addition made after the main period of surname formation, perhaps under the influence of patronymic forms with a possessive -s.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Bruacháin ‘descendant of Bruachán’, a byname for a large-bellied person. The English form was chosen because of a mistaken association of the Gaelic name with bruach ‘bank’. Compare Bank 6.

nameMeanings.name: Lydia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Greek origin, meaning ‘woman from Lydia’, an area of Asia Minor. The name is borne in the Bible by a woman of Thyatira who was converted by St Paul and who entertained him in her house (Acts 16:14–15, 40). It has enjoyed steady popularity in the English-speaking world since the 17th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Lydia Bangs was born about 1642, in Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Edward Bangs, was 53 and her mother, Rebecka, was 28. She married Benjamin Higgins Sr. on 24 December 1661, in Eastham, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 13 February 1706, in Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lydia Bangs est née environ 1642, à Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Edward Bangs, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Rebecka, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Benjamin Higgins Sr. le 24 décembre 1661, à Eastham, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 février 1706, à Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 65 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lydia Bangs è nata il circa 1642 nel Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Edward Bangs, aveva 53 anni e sua madre, Rebecka, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Benjamin Higgins Sr. il 24 dicembre 1661, nel Eastham, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 13 febbraio 1706, nel Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lydia Bangsが約1642年にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーで生まれた時，父Edward Bangsは53歳，母Rebeckaは28歳であった。1661年12月24日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーエアスサムでBenjamin Higgins Sr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1706年2月13日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルエアスサムで65歳で死去した。

ko.Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 이스섬

ko.Eastham, Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, Br: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 바른스타블일 이스섬
ko.lifeSummary: Lydia Bangs(이)가 대략 1642년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edward Bangs(은)는 53세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rebecka(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1661년 12월 24일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 이스섬에서 Benjamin Higgins Sr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1706년 2월 13일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 이스섬에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lydia Bangs nasceu aproximadamente 1642, em Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Edward Bangs, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Rebecka, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Benjamin Higgins Sr. em 24 de dezembro de 1661, em Eastham, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 13 de fevereiro de 1706, em Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 65 anos.

ru.Eastham, Barnstable, Plymouth Colony, Br: эастам, барнстабл, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lydia Bangs родилась около 1642 г. в местности плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Edward Bangs было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Rebecka, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Benjamin Higgins Sr. 24 декабря 1661 г. в местности эастам, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 13 февраля 1706 г. в местности эастам, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lydia Bangs nació aproximadamente 1642, en Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Edward Bangs, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Rebecka, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Benjamin Higgins Sr. el 24 de diciembre de 1661, en Eastham, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 13 de febrero de 1706, en Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 65 años.
